testcase.name: test_year_projections_returns_correct_structure
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_120_projections.py:65: in test_year_projections_returns_correct_structure assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
